sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try clicking on purple blocks at top
# First find their positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
purples = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'p']
print(f"Purple: {len(purples)}")
for p in purples:
    center = (sum(r[0] for r in p['boundary'])//len(p['boundary']), sum(r[1] for r in p['boundary'])//len(p['boundary']))
    print(f"  center={center}, pixels={p['pixels']}")
# Try clicking on first purple block
if purples:
    p = purples[0]
    center = (sum(r[0] for r in p['boundary'])//len(p['boundary']), sum(r[1] for r in p['boundary'])//len(p['boundary']))
    action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': center[0], 'col': center[1]}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
